records.ety: [L. desistere; de- + sistere to stand, stop, fr. stare to stand: cf. F. dsister. See Stand.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Desisted; p. pr. & vb. n. Desisting.]

defs: To cease to proceed or act; to stop; to forbear; -- often with from.
quotes: To desist from his bad practice.
Desist (thou art discern'd, And toil'st in vain).
